conversation.message_text: Simply Earth: Welcome to Simply Earth! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.

Simply Earth: Hi Earthie! This is Sarah. Thanks for signing up via text! Use code UNICORN to get a free unicorn diffuser with your 1st Recipe Box! https://simplyearth.attn.tv/adG15eIDEUyZ 

Have any questions? Reply here! Stop to stop

Simply Earth: Hey, Earthie! You forgot to check out our best selling Recipe Box. It's in your cart - simplyearth.attn.tv/a_GPgio6AA82

Do you have questions about this product? I'm ready to help! Stop to stop
I sent an email.

The payment portion is unclear. The credit card information that I am supposed to type my information into is overlapping and unclear..it’s all on one line and not labeled. For instance, it has a 00/00 spot which I assume is asking for a valid thru date, but it doesn’t not say that. And there is a 000 spot that I am guessing is for the verification number on my card but it doesn’t say that. And the actual credit card number, when I type it in, overlaps those previously mentioned numbers. Maybe it’s designed for a computer and I’m using my phone? I don’t know, but it seems unprofessional to me and makes me a little suspicious. 

—Tracy Wiesenberg.
801-510-4634
Template used: "Apologies for the inconvenience - All brands"; last updated: 2023-10-10 17:55:26.854
Template used: "Not the experience"; last updated: 2026-02-25 23:11:20.792

Simply Earth: My sincere apologies for the inconvenience! Surely, this isn't the experience I want you to have. Since you already emailed us, someone from the team will get back to you as soon as possible. Please check your spam and promo folders as well, as our emails sometimes end up there.

Every time I try to check out it offers me a free T-shirt but then charges me for it in the cart.Can you please help?

Talentless: I'm so sorry for the confusion. You can get a FREE Mystery Tee for a minimum order of $175. If your order meets this requirement, please send a screenshot of your cart showing the items you're trying to purchase. That'll help us better understand what's happening on your side.
Before I add
After I add

Talentless: Thanks for the screenshots. It appears that there is a discount code applied to your cart. Unfortunately, you won't be able to use multiple deals at checkout. You can only take advantage of one offer at a time. I'm sorry about that.
It does not say that I received a email to take an additional 20% off my cart. The website says spend $175 and get a free shirt 2 different things and offers it while the code is applied to my cart.
Talentless: Thanks for the screenshot! Can you also send me a screenshot of your checkout page? I'll be more than happy to check this for you!
If you look at the first screenshot it shows the code applied and still offers the shirt

Talentless: Thank you for the screenshot. I truly apologize for the inconvenience. I have checked further, and if you try to remove the code, it will give you the free shirt at checkout, however, if you proceed to use the 20% off code, the free shirt promotion will not reflect.
As I have previously mentioned, you will not be able to use multiple deals at checkout, but please feel free to use the one that gives you the best value.
